feed.title: Australian Merger Tracker
feed.subtitle: Recent ACCC merger notifications, determinations, and review events

entry.title: Sembcorp Industries Ltd - Alinta Energy: On 7 April 2026, Sembcorp gave the ACCC additional information and documents in response to the ACCC’s decision under s 51ABY of the CCA. Accordingly, the effective notification date is 7 April 2026.
entry.id: https://mergers.fyi/mergers/MN-95001#2026-04-07T12:00:00Z-On 7 April 2026, Sembcorp gave the ACCC additional
entry.summary: Merger: Sembcorp Industries Ltd - Alinta Energy (MN-95001). Event: On 7 April 2026, Sembcorp gave the ACCC additional information and documents in response to the ACCC’s decision under s 51ABY of the CCA. Accordingly, the effective notification date is 7 April 2026..
